title: Gaming Keyboard and Mouse Combo, MageGee GK770 RGB Backlit Wired Gaming Keyboard with Multimedia Keys, Ergonomic Wrist Rest Computer Keyboard, 3200 DPI Gaming Mouse for Windows PC Gamers
features: ✅GAMING KEYBOARD & MOUSE: A standard 104 keys layout plus 10 multimedia function keys (total 114 keys), gives faster response and better tactile feedback. Accurate, comfortable, soft touch with anti-ghosting functionality. RGB backlit effect provides a unique visual experience, taking you into a pretty cool gaming atmosphere. Ergonomic wrist rest offers enough support and protection to your hands, and reduce hand fatigue caused by long-term use.

✅10 MULTIMEDIA KEYS & 25 NON-CONFLICT KEYS: 10 independent multimedia keys at the top of the keyboard makes it quick access to music player, email, computer, calculator without interrupting your game. 25 anti-ghosting keys allow you to press or hold multiple keys simultaneously, helping you win in the fierce game without being bound by speed. Adjustable rear feet and non-slip pads provide comfortable typing experience.

✅RGB LED BACKLIGHT KEYBOARD: The keyboard has RGB light settings with multiple modes (dynamic backlit or solid static light) to choose from, making it shining and sparkling in the dark, easy to find the correct keys and reduce error rate. You can adjust backlight brightness and speed according to personal preference. The backlight also can be turned off / on by pressing Fn + Page Down.

✅ADJUSTABLE DPI GAMING MOUSE: 7 colors LED breathing backlit ( blue, yellow, green, white, purple, red, cyan), 4 adjustable DPI - 600/800/1200/1600/2400/3200 to match the mouse speed instantly for different game scenarios. Advanced gaming optical sensor ensures accurate positioning and stable transmission. Pressing the DPI button for 3 seconds can turn off the mouse backlight. Contoured shape fits your hands perfectly, comfortable to use.

✅WIDE COMPATIBILITY: The USB wired keyboard and mouse combo is simple to use, just plug and play, no need for additional driver or software. Works well with Win2000, Win XP, WinME, Vista, Win7, Win8, Android, linux, Mac and other operating systems. Suitable for gaming beginners or lovers.

reviews.title: Nice design
reviews.text: I use this with my netbook to control it across the room. It is smaller than most other mouse. It goes easily in my travel bag. Nice design. I got tired of plain black.

reviews.title: One of the best everyday mice I've used
reviews.text:
I have input devices for drawing on my tablet, and I have a gaming mouse, but the Logitech M305 is an excellent mouse for every day use, so it's the one I use the most.

The mouse itself has very basic features,
* scroll wheel (mild clicking feedback)with side-click options
* battery status light (green when fully charged, red when almost out)
* two buttons
* an off switch
* a nano USB transmitter than stores inside the mouse
* uses a single AA battery

It does come in jazzy designs, and I liked the yellow/gold one the best. The one thing I might have wanted to change on this mouse is the on/off switch. The best nano-USB mouse I've ever had would automatically turn off when you stored the transmitter inside. With this one, be sure to flip the switch to off as well before you put it in your bag, or it will be down there draining the battery as it moves around.

title: Redragon K556 RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard M612 Wired Gaming Mouse Bundle

K556 Keyboard: The mechanical brown switch offers the best tactile typing experience, also being ever so slightly quieter, fitting for office or gaming use. And you will get 8 spared switches as a gift.

K556 Keyboard: RGB LED adjustable lighting with 6-themed backlights -18 lighting models. You can also adjust their brightness with FN+“↑”and“↓” Besides, there is a 9-color single backlit mode for this keyboard.

M612 Mouse: Pentakill, 5 DPI Levels - Geared with 5 redefinable DPI levels (default as: 500/1000/2000/3000/4000), easy to switch between different game needs. Dedicated demand of DPI options between 500-8000 is also available to be processed by software.

M612 Mouse: Any Button is Reassignable - 11 programmable buttons are all editable with customizable tactical keybinds in whatever game or work you are engaging. 1 rapid fire + 2 side macro buttons offer you a better gaming and working experience.

【AUTOMATIC POWER SAVING FUNCTION】The EDJO wireless keyboard and mouse combo has the function of automatically entering the power-saving state. 【WIRELESS OPTICAL MOUSE】The mouse was optical design, even on some smooth surfaces, precise control can be obtained. 3-level adjustable DPI (800/1200/1600) allows you to choose your favorite moving speed of cursor. More than that, it is a surprisingly comfortable keyboard to work with. The keys are responsive and accurate. I can put it at an angle that I like. It is easy to store away. I just really like it more than I had expected. I may not have had particular expectations. I just wanted to try out a keyboard/mouse set on a PC that wasn't getting much use, but I may end up putting this set with my main PC set up. I like it that much.

reviews.title: Liked it until .....
reviews.text:
As I began typing, I liked the smooth, quite feel BUT quickly discovered that this keyboard does NOT have a 'Print Screen' key, which is vital when working. DO NOT Buy this if you need it for work. As you can see in the picture provided, the 'F11' key is NOT labeled.
F11 toggles from Full Screen back to regular screen. The first 4 keys at the top of the number key pad are TOTALLY UNNECESSARY.
1st key) Same function as Ctrl+C (Copy)
2nd key) Does Absolutely Nothing!
3rd key) Same function as Ctrl+V, (Paste)
4th key) Same function as Ctrl+X (Cut)
Had this keyboard followed the SAME FORMAT
The keyboard is overpriced to be missing a vital function as Print Screen Key.

reviews.title: Great battery life
reviews.text: I'm still not fully decided about how I feel about this mouse. But, I can talk about what I know so far. The packaging I got the mouse and was really nice, really simple, but easy to open. The mouse was easy to set up, and the RGB looks pretty cool. There is a really cool DPI changer function that makes gaming much easier, however, I can't recommend this mouse for gaming because the ergonomics are pretty trash. I have to cramp my hand like a claw over the top of the mouse and after long periods of use it does start hurting. The surface is also pretty slippery, so I found that my hand slips on the mouse all the time. The tracking however, is great! And I would have to say that biggest plus is the battery life. I got this about 2 weeks ago, charged it once, and it is yet to die! I think the features of this mouse are great, but I would not recommend it. Purely because of the ergonomics, if you are going to use this mouse often, then you probably should go if something more ergonomic.

reviews.title: Basic but functions well
reviews.text: I ordered a ‘LED Wireless Mouse, Uiosmuph G12 Slim Rechargeable Wireless Silent Mouse, 2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Silver)’ for review.  For the price point, this is a basic mouse.  The rotating light strip is a cool looking feature.  It is sleek in design.  It connected well with the dongle to my Surface Pro.  It glides well over a mouse pad.  It is rechargeable, which I prefer to battery operated.  The click of this mouse is quiet. The dongle slides into the bottom and of course it has already been lost.  I prefer the dongle to be stored in a closed compartment on a mouse.  It does not require recharging for several days of moderate use and seems to charge quickly.  Overall, for basic use, this mouse works well.

reviews.title: Nice small keyboard
reviews.text: I love the keyboard, but am use to a particular key location on my old dell keyboard. I wanted something smaller for traveling and this is a nice size. I just could not get use to the placement of the number keys, and arrow keys so was making too many errors so had to return it. Had it not been for that I would have given it 5 stars.

reviews.title: Among the smallest with full size keys/keyboard
reviews.text: This product has a small footprint and so takes up less desktop space.  But I found the mouse equally small to the point that I returned the product -- and I don't even have large hands.  So consider this before you buy.  Otherwise it's a good product.

Overall I was very pleased with the product. Really looovvvve how cute it looks.

title: LED Wireless Mouse, Wireless Mouse for Desktop Computerr,Wireless Mouse for MacBook pro/air/pc/Laptop,,2.4G Portable USB Optical Wireless Computer Mice with USB Receiver and Type C Adapter (Black)
description: 7 Colorful LED breathing light change alternately, soothing light lights up the mouse in dark, adds more fun to the life. Note: It can't be set to one specific color. How to use it? * Charge the mouse for about 2 hours before using it for the first time. 1. Take the dongle out, which is stored at the bottom of the mouse. 2. Insert the dongle into the USB port of your device, and open the mouse switch (at the bottom of the mouse). 3. Allow a few seconds for installing, no action needed, just wait. Then you can use it. Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. Turn on the power switch and the mouse will work. Tips: The mouse cursor will move slowly or stop moving when the mouse is low battery. Please charge it on time. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
features: 2020 Latest Upgrade LED Design】The upgraded version mouse with the LED lights adds more fun to the boring office life. The bottom of the mouse has a switch, you can switch lights freely. Low-key or sparkle, switch in one second, suitable for any occasion.

Equipped with USB-C to USB adapter, let you worry-free use of any device.

Just 2 hours charging, you can use it about 7-15 days. Standby time is very long, energy-saving features, automatic sleep mode and wake-up mode are installed to save energy. Please Note: If your laptop just with type-c port, You need connect the supplied USB-C to USB adapter to your laptop and plug the USB receiver in to it.

title: Logitech POP Mouse, Wireless Mouse with Customizable Emojis, SilentTouch Technology, Precision/Speed Scroll, Compact Design, Bluetooth, Multi-Device, OS Compatible - Mist
description: Logitech POP Mouse - Silent Wireless Mouse Let personality POP on your deskspace and beyond with POP Mouse, your whisper-quiet, wireless mouse with fresh customization features. Take your self-expression further and download Logitech Software to customize the top button. Give it your own twist by assigning it to send your favorite emoji or another shortcut - such as Snip Screen, Mic Mute or Voice-to-Text. POP Mouse fits comfortably in your hand and slips easily into your pocket, handbag or computer case. SilentTouch technology makes every click whisper-quiet. The portable mouse's SmartWheel stays in sync with you, easily shifting from high-precision to speed scroll mode. Pair POP Mouse with up to 3 different devices at once, and use the Easy-Switch button to toggle between them. Alternatively, activate FLOW and glide between screens as you work, transferring text, files and images with a simple copy and paste. Connect the cordless mouse to your desktop, tablet or phone* using Bluetooth or a Logi Bolt USB receiver which you can purchase separately. With a classic Logitech promise of durability, POP Mouse is your companion for the long haul, with up to 24-month battery life** and auto-sleep power-saving technology that helps it last. Product details: Number of buttons: 4 Top button customizable with Emoji Software Sensor technology: Logitech High Precision Optical Tracking Battery type: 1 x AA battery (included) Battery life: Up to 24 months** Connection type: Bluetooth 5.1 Compatible with Logi Bolt USB receiver Wireless range: 32.81 ft (10 m) Compatible with Windows 10 or later, macOS 10.15 or later, iPadOS, Chrome OS and Android *Windows, macOS, Chrome OS, Android, iPadOS **Battery life may vary based on use and computing conditions.
features: Less is more: Soft grey and natural sand colors kiss on an elegant, minimalist palette, allowing you to make an understated impact with POP Silent Mouse in Mist
Bold, comfy, quiet: A compact and comfy wireless mouse with up to 24-month battery life that fits snugly in your palm, handbag and computer case, with SilentTouch Technology for whisper-quiet working
The emoji button: Press the colorful mouse's magic middle button to open a menu of emojis to use in your chats, or give it your own shortcut using Logitech Software (Windows and macOS only)
Shift gears on the fly: As if reading your mind, POP Mouse’s SmartWheel shifts from high-precision tracking to speed scroll mode, helping you whizz through long documents with one confident flick
FLOW between worlds: Connect to up to 3 devices on Windows, Mac, Chrome OS or Android using Bluetooth and glide between screens using the Easy-Switch button or FLOW
Aesthetic pair: Match your POP Mouse with the fun and bouncy typing experience of POP Keys wireless mechanical keyboard, with customizable emoji keycaps and cutting-edge media keys

Plastic parts in POP Mouse include certified post consumer recycled plastic (Blast: 46%; Daydream, Heartbreaker and Mist: 29%; Cosmos: 27%*). *Excludes printed wiring assembly (PWA) plastics, and packaging.
Certified carbon neutral: the carbon impact of POP Mouse has been reduced to zero.

reviews.title: Horrible Connection
reviews.text: I’ve tried this mouse with multiple devices now and it disconnects and reconnects every five seconds. It’s basically impossible to use.

reviews.title: Quiet and super fast Bluetooth setup - no Emoji function with iPadOS
reviews.text: Within a minute of taking this out of the box, I had it paired with my iPad. It was seriously so easy to just pair and go, and I love how it can be paired with three different things (just push a little button on the bottom of the mouse to switch between computers/iPads). It feels okay in my hand - not the highest quality I’ve seen (plastic is very basic and it is pretty lightweight as well), but it doesn’t feel cheap. The color is so fun, which is the main reason I got it. Also it is very quiet and doesn’t have any loud clicking. The one thing to mention is that the circle button under the scrolling wheel doesn’t have any functionality with an iPad. Nothing was happening when I kept clicking it to try and use the emoji shortcut, so after heading over to Logitech’s website i saw “*Emojis and software are currently supported on Windows® and macOS only.” So maybe iPadOS will eventually support this capability, but as of now it is useless. Overall I still like the mouse a lot for it’s ease of use, quietness, and color.

reviews.title: Beautiful little mouse with a pink color that truly POPS!
reviews.text:
THE GOOD:
---------------
* The pink color of this mouse really POPS!
* Operation is smooth, just like any mouse.
* Multi device with a click of button underneath the mouse. You can save up to 3 devices.
* Battery is included and is rated for 2 yrs. Wow, we'll see.
* Emoji dedicated center button for chats.
* Weighs 2.9 ounces.

THE BAD:
------------
* No information in box whatsoever about the emoji software. You'll need to go to Logitech's website and do some digging. I didn't bother since my little girl won't be chatting.
* Bluetooth only. No mentioning in the manual whether or not it works with their unifying receiver.

I got this mouse because my little girl loves pink, and the red coral color here truly pops! She does basic homework stuff on the pc. She's not at that chatting age yet, so I don't really care or tested the emoji feature. Logitech didn't make it easy for you to test it out anyway, so I didn't bother. I'll go 4-Stars overall.

reviews.title: great trustworthy brand, ergonomically comfortable with hours of use.
reviews.text: we have used logitech for so many of our technology needs over the decades and we love the new wireless mouse, which was super easy to connect.  the mouse can connect up to 3 appliances including tablets.  works for both android and apple.  very effortless to use and silent. the emoji button is not what we were looking for, but a plus.  Not being a Y gen - lol, it took me a while to figure how to work the emoji button.  again, not a key aspect for us.  Curious to test that the battery will last for 1 year as claimed, but easy to take off the 'color' plate and replace the AA battery.  very happy with the color.  fun and ergonomically comfortable.

reviews.title: I like the mouse
reviews.text: It is a piece of cotton candy fluff in my hands. I can move quickly over my laptop screen and edit easily. It paired immediately too. For those who like social media, you get an emoji button too. You just push on the wheel and hit the right part of the mouse top. I do not like social media anymore. But others do all the time.  They will love the ease of this mouse.

title: Corsair Ironclaw Wireless RGB, Rechargeable Wireless Optical Gaming Mouse with Slipstream Technology (18,000 DPI Optical Sensor, 3-Zone RGB Multi-Colour Backlighting), Black
description: The Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse combines an ultra-accurate native 18, 000 DPI optical sensor with a durable contoured shape that’s ideal for larger hands and palm grips. Easily connect to your PC via hyper-fast, sub-1ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless Technology Bluetooth or USB wired connection, with up to 50 hours of battery life. Powerful Corsair iCUE software allows you to precisely tune sensitivity in 1 DPI steps, customize the ten programmable buttons with macros or remaps, and synchronize your mouse’s three-zone RGB lighting with all your iCUE-compatible Corsair devices. With the freedom of wireless and the customizable precision you need to take your gameplay higher, take victory in hand with the Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless.
features: Three Ways to Game: Connect with hyper-fast, sub-1 ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless technology, low-latency bluetooth, or USB wired
Comfort when it counts: Contoured shape that’s sculpted specifically for palm-grips and larger hands

Powerfully precise optical gaming sensor: A custom Pixart PMW3391 native 18,000 DPI sensor, adjustable in one DPI resolution steps, gives you total sensitivity customization and ultra-accurate tracking
Ten fully programmable buttons: Customise the way you play with powerful macros and key remaps to give you an in-game advantage
Ultra-durable Omron Switches: Rated for more than 50 million clicks

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

reviews.title: my favorite keyboard
reviews.text: This keyboard is the best! It is comfortable to use, matches my desk setup perfectly, and best of all, the keys AND the mouse are basically totally silent! My 10-month-old is a VERY light sleeper! Everything wakes her up, but not these. A major win for me! Highly recommend. 100% I would buy this again! (batteries are not included. You need one aa battery for the keyboard and also the mouse)

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot
reviews.text:
Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO
-Ubiquitous AA battery for mouse
-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next
-A place to put your phone (nice touch!)

CON
-Neither is backlit
-KB not programmable

NEUTRAL
-Non-'clack-y' key design, these are "quiet"
-Some humans will like pink, not widely available, maybe a good gift
-Con (for me) is the wireless mouse

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great little retro cordless keyboard and mouse combo. I ordered it because it has just one dongle that both operate from. That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse
reviews.text: Love the pink color of this retro keyboard and mouse.  Great that the keyboard is spill proof I can have my coffee and not worry about wrecking my keyboard.  Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!

title: FD V8 Wireless Mouse Battery Included, 2.4G Cute Colorful Animal Slim Silent Travel Cordless Mouse Optical Designed Mice with Nano Receiver Compatible for Laptop Computer PC Chromebook (Blue Fox)
features: 2.4GHz Wireless ensures reliable connection with a long working distance of up to 10m and 250Hz super high speed rate of return, which eliminates delays, dropouts and interference.

Cute Animals matte surface, quiet & ergonomic design and comfortable cherry wheel provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and perfect for travel as well, just enjoy it with its silent click.

Intelligent power saving design eliminates the need to change batteries often. The wireless mouse will enter into power saving mode after 5 minutes free, click left or right button to wake it when you want it to work again, so the on and off switch is not required.
A tiny USB Nano receiver (stored within the back of the mouse) conveniently slots into your computer's USB port, and takes up minimal space. No need to drive, plug and play directly.

Work with Laptop, Notebook, Computer, PC, Mac, Chrome book and more. 30 days money-back & 6-months guaranty, when you are not satisfied with our product, please don't hesitate to get a after-sale service, we will give you a satisfied response within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Jumps
reviews.text: COuld not slow down this mouse to be useable.

reviews.title: Works perfectly
reviews.text: Bought this for my grandson for his birthday and it worked perfectly right away. He loves it.

reviews.title: Tricky to set up
reviews.text: At first I was very displeased because I did not realize the USB was INSIDE the mouse. Then I had to replace the battery in it to get it to finally work. Now that its is working I love it. It does very well with my Macbook Air. Its not highly ergonomic, so if you need extra comfort I would choose another mouse.

reviews.text: Works great and I have not had any problems. I have had it a while.
